snapshot.title: The Worst Gift on the Internet
snapshot.bodyTextSample: The Worst Internet GiftSend a GiftChoose your level of disappointment.Generate a QR code, print it or send it, and give your friend absolutely nothing.Send Nothing — €1.99Send Premium Nothing — €3.99See what's included14people have already paid to send absolutely nothing.Humanity continues to disappoint.How it works01Buy nothing.02Get your QR code.03Give it to your friend.04They receive absolutely nothing.Minimal effort. Maximum confusion.Pick your poison.Now available in premium disappointment.Nothing€1.99A beautifully disappointing prank gift.Unique QR codeShareable gift linkClassic gift revealRevenge optionSend NothingMOST DISAPPOINTINGPremium Nothing€3.99For when regular disappointment isn't enough.Unique QR codeShareable gift linkPremium reveal pageDramatic fake gift summaryElegant revenge endingSend Premium NothingWhy people love thisIt's the gift that keeps on disappointing.🎂Perfect for birthdaysPut the QR code in a birthday card and watch the reaction.💼Perfect office prankGive it to a coworker and pretend it's something expensive.⚔️Perfect revengeWhen someone gives you a bad gift, return the favor.Terrible ReviewsReviews from people who received absolutely nothing.★★★★★"I scanned the QR code at my birthday dinner. It said my friend sent me nothing."— Sarah K.★★★★★"My coworker gave me this during Secret Santa. HR is now involved."— Tom R.★★★★★"I thought it was AirPods. It was disappointment."— Chris D.★★★★★"Minimal effort. Maximum emotional damage."— Alex M.★★★★★"My brother gave me this. We are no longer speaking."— Jamie L.Victims are speaking out.Leave a terrible reviewReviews can only be left by scanning a gifted QR code.How to deliver the worst gift properlyA terrible gift with excellent delivery.💡Print the QR code and put it inside a birthday card.💡Give it to them with a serious face.💡Say: 'This one took me a long time to find.'💡Works especially well for siblings.Important questionsIs this a real gift?No.What does the recipient get?Absolutely nothi
